classObjective: Solve systems of linear equations using elimination when multiplication of one or both equations is required.
workedExamples: 7-4, Example 2 — Applications of Systems of Equations (Multiplication)
warmUp: What multiple of x + y = 5 would eliminate x when added to 3x + 2y = 12?
conceptDevelopment: Mini-lesson: LCM of coefficients; choosing which variable to eliminate; multiplying one or both equations
guidedPractice: Teacher-led practice solving systems by elimination with multiplication required
independentPractice: Practice problems solving systems using elimination with one or both equations multiplied
assessment: Exit ticket: solve by elimination: 2x + 3y = 8 and 4x - 5y = 2
capReflection: How do you decide which variable to eliminate when using elimination with multiplication?
